decoder.name: sangfor_fields
decoder.regex: Log Type: (\.+), App Category:(\.+), Username/Host:(\.+), Outbound\(\.*\):(\.+), Inbound\(\.*\):(\.+), Bidirectional\(\.*\):(\.+)
decoder.order: sangfor.logType, sangfor.appCategory, sangfor.host_ip, sangfor.bytes_sent, sangfor.bytes_received, sangfor.bytes

decoder.name: sangfor_fields
decoder.regex: Log type: (\.+), policy name:(\.+), user:(\.+), Src IP:(\.+), Src port:\s*(\d+), Dst IP:(\.+), Dst port:\s*(\d+), App category:(\.+), application:(\.+), action:(\.+)
decoder.order: sangfor.logType, sangfor.policyName, dstuser, srcip, srcport, dstip, dstport, sangfor.appCategory, sangfor.application, action

decoder.name: sangfor_fields
decoder.regex: Log type: (\.+), type:(\.+), Src IP:(\.+), Src port:(\d+), Dst IP:(\.+), Dst port:(\d+), protocol:(\d+), translated-to IP:(\.+), translated-to port:(\d+)
decoder.order: sangfor.logType, sangfor.type, srcip, srcport, dstip, dstport, protocol, sangfor.translated_to_ip, sangfor.translated_to_port
